hero.title: Explore the product catalog behind Patience AI
hero.description: Product-led solutions designed to show real value, route requests cleanly, and support every stage of evaluation.

products.name: Pariksha ki Taiyari
products.shortTagline: Fast, adaptive exam prep with intelligent practice, feedback, and collaboration.
products.summary: An intelligent exam-prep platform delivering timed practice, instant feedback, and personalized recommendations for focused learning.
benefits: AI-augmented recommendations and smart content filtering to surface the most relevant lessons.
Timed practice sessions with instant scoring and progress tracking to accelerate skill building.
Real-time collaboration and seamless sync across devices for group study and continuity.
Mobile-first, low-bandwidth delivery to ensure consistent performance in constrained networks.
Privacy-first controls and secure data handling for trusted learning experiences.
technologies: Modern JavaScript frontend with mobile-first delivery
Scalable cloud backend for secure APIs and session handling
Real-time sync layer for live collaboration
Edge or on-device ML for personalized recommendations
Durable cloud storage with offline resume support
products.audience: Learners and institutions seeking a performance-focused, AI-enhanced exam preparation solution
products.privacyTone: Privacy and security focused; enterprise controls available

products.name: AI Email SaaS
products.shortTagline: Enterprise email automation with secure rules, context-aware drafting, and actionable analytics.
products.summary: Enterprise AI email automation that produces context-aware drafts, enforces templates and policies, and provides actionable analytics for operations teams.
benefits: Production-grade AI generates context-aware, brand-aligned drafts while respecting templates and business rules.
Template-driven personalization at scale keeps tone, compliance, and brand intact across high volumes.
Admin analytics and controls let teams tune AI behavior and measure business impact.
Low-latency delivery pipeline designed for reliability and auditability.
Secure integration and observability for compliance and operational transparency.
technologies: Production AI model integration for generation and classification
Asynchronous backend paired with a reactive frontend
Ingestion to delivery pipeline with monitoring and retries
Scalable cloud deployment and observability for enterprise SLAs
Secure, auditable data handling and admin controls
products.audience: Operations, marketing, and customer-facing teams looking to scale compliant, high-quality email workflows

detailPages.title: Features
detailPages.description: Built for Indian teams and global buyers that need a product-first AI surface with clear governance and a clean handoff to sales.
points: Multilingual-ready content patterns for English, Hindi, and global rollout without redesigning the page.
Low-bandwidth layouts that stay readable for India-first deployments and APAC traffic.
Single-source publishing for product, launch, and campaign updates across regions and time zones.
Context-aware request capture for demos, pilots, and enterprise evaluations.

detailPages.title: Integrations
detailPages.description: Connect with the tools Indian and international teams already use while keeping the experience simple for public users.
points: WhatsApp, email, Slack, Microsoft Teams, and CRM handoffs for regional and global operations.
NeonDB-backed form storage with room for India-specific workflows and enterprise reporting.
Route-based navigation and modal actions that keep the public site clean and predictable.
Flexible content delivery for SaaS, services, and AI product campaigns across markets.

detailPages.title: Pricing
detailPages.description: Simple packaging for pilots, enterprise rollouts, and cross-border procurement conversations.
points: Clear pilot and enterprise entry points for buyers in India, the Middle East, Europe, and North America.
INR-friendly conversations for local teams and USD-based packaging for international deals.
Easy-to-update pricing language for monthly, annual, and custom deployment models.
A sales path that stays focused on value, governance, and measurable outcomes.

detailPages.title: Changelog
detailPages.description: Track product updates, content releases, and rollout notes in a way that works across IST and UTC teams.
points: Publish notes with author, date, and time for both Indian and international teams.
Release updates that reflect product, content, and workflow changes in one place.
Easy to scan from desktop and mobile without hiding the important details.
A clean editorial trail for ops, marketing, and product stakeholders.

detailPages.title: About Us
detailPages.description: Patience AI builds calm, practical AI experiences for teams that want less noise, faster decisions, and products people actually enjoy using.
points: We turn complex AI ideas into clean services that feel simple, useful, and ready for real work.
Our approach blends product clarity, thoughtful automation, and disciplined execution so teams move faster without losing control.
We design for trust: readable interfaces, clear next steps, and workflows that stay understandable as they scale.
Patience AI is built to make ambitious products feel calm, credible, and easy to say yes to.

detailPages.title: Privacy Policy
detailPages.description: A practical privacy posture for Indian and international data handling expectations.
points: Form submissions are handled through controlled server endpoints with minimal exposure.
Admin access uses signed sessions and content updates stay auditable.
DPDP-aligned handling for India with GDPR-aware structure for international use.
Common startup controls such as DPA handling, audit trails, and retention review are supported.
No unnecessary public disclosure of operational or customer data.

detailPages.title: Terms of Service
detailPages.description: Simple operating terms for site usage, demo requests, and admin-managed content updates.
points: Use the site honestly and submit accurate information when requesting contact.
Request flows are routed by product and context for better follow-up.
Public content can be updated without changing the supported user journey.
Common startup standards such as NDA, DPA, acceptable use, and security review terms may apply.
The experience is intended to stay stable, readable, and secure across regions.

hero.title: Patience AI notes, launches, and product thinking
hero.description: Notes, launches, and product thinking published from the editorial console.

posts.title: Shipping a low-friction demo flow for enterprise AI
posts.excerpt: How we keep demo requests contextual, fast, and routed to the right owner without adding friction.
content: Enterprise buyers need context before they commit. The demo flow should capture enough detail to route the request correctly, but not so much that it becomes a form abandonment problem.
We keep the primary request short, prefill the product name, and store the submission with clear routing metadata so the owner can follow up quickly.
The goal is to make the interaction feel responsive and specific while still keeping the workflow simple enough to run at scale.

posts.title: Why admin-controlled content matters for AI product sites
posts.excerpt: A single JSON-backed content source makes updates faster, safer, and easier to audit.
content: When the same content powers the homepage, products, and blog, the admin surface needs to be predictable. A single source of truth removes hidden hard-coding and reduces drift.
We prefer storing the whole site in one structured document so product launches, blog posts, and CTA changes can be published together.
That makes the site easier to evolve without breaking layout assumptions or shipping partial updates.
